title: The Hallmarks of a General AI System
description: A conceptual diagram illustrating the core components and their interconnections that characterize a hypothetical, fully-realized Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), as conceptualized by the term 'Prentice Hall of India'.
relationships: Perception feeds data into the Knowledge Base; The Reasoning Engine uses the Knowledge Base to form plans; The Learning Module updates the Knowledge Base and improves Reasoning based on outcomes; The Reasoning Engine sends commands to the Action module to affect the environment
